purpose: Prepare a human-attended, read-only DevHub pilot without recording private session artifacts.
preflight: Open a visible browser only after policy validation passes.
Require the user to complete any sign-in, MFA, CAPTCHA, or security prompt manually.
Observe only page headings, landmarks, redacted action labels, and public help links.
allowed_actions: record whether a read-only page is reachable after user attendance
write commit-safe completion evidence without private values
prohibitions: Do not automate login, MFA, CAPTCHA, account creation, password recovery, credential entry, or security prompts.
Do not store cookies, auth state, screenshots, traces, HAR files, private field values, payment details, or local private file paths.
Do not click submit, certify, upload, schedule, cancel, withdraw, purchase, pay, or change account settings.
Do not claim that live authenticated capture has already occurred from this fixture.
completion_claim: This packet is a deterministic preflight fixture only.
